title: Crypto asset manager CoinShares to begin trading on Nasdaq through SPAC merger
summary_full: CoinShares is merging with Vine Hill Capital to form the holding company CoinShares PLC in a deal valuing the business at about $1.2 billion.
summary_public: CoinShares is merging with Vine Hill Capital to form the holding company CoinShares PLC in a deal valuing the business at about $1.2 billion.
